MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF APR-20-2009 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON APR-20-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 611, PAUL H. ALVARADO. CASE DID NOT SETTLE WITH JUDGE PRO TEM. TIME ESTIMATE: 2 HOURS. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN CSR #4780 (D206)
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF VILLAVICENCIO, HUGO HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF HUGO VILLAVICENCIO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE PARTIES AGREEMENT ALLOWED DEFENDANT TO PAY RENT WITH HIS LABOR AND WHETHER HE DID SO FAR AT LEAST SOME PORTION OF THE RENT CLAIMED IN THIS ACTION. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-20-2009 CONTINUED TO APR-21-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN 611 AS ORDERED BY THE COURT; WITS SWN & EXMN'D., DOCUMENT. EVIDENCE INTRDC'D. & MRK'D.; ORDERED CONTINUED ON TRIAL BY COURT. JUDGE: HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; REPORTER: TAMRA KEEN, C.S.R. #5404 (D-611).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLAVICENCIO, HUGO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUERRERO, JUAN MANUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 NATOMA ST., #4, S.F., CA. $7,066.60 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,066.60, LEASE FORFEITED, PLUS PER DIEM DAMAGES OF $2,279.93, AND COSTS TBD PER MEMO OF COSTS. SEE SCANNED DOC
